content: Go RFC 7807 Problem Details: hand-roll a simple struct. Fields: Type (stable URI string), Title (log-safe string), Status (int), Detail (developer explanation). Content-Type: application/problem+json. Third-party libs: moogar0880/problems, josestg/problemdetail, askeladdk/hproblem — all small and stable but not worth depending on for a simple struct. REQ-NF-001 says: type, title, status, detail fields only. Pattern: define ProblemDetail struct in backend/internal/api/problem.go, write helper function WriteProblem(w, status, type, title, detail).
